programme.title: Dimplex Heating - Conquer the Cold
programme.desc: Dimplex Heating is a world leader in intelligent electric heating and cooling using renewable solutions. With Dimplex you can expect some of the most innovative and stylish home appliances.

programme.title: Koalabi Footwear
programme.desc: Experience the cosy embrace of natural sheepskin with Koalabi Footwear. Luxuriously lined with thick fleece for superior insulation. These fashionable styles are a must-have.

programme.title: Tenderflame - Revolutionary Flames
programme.desc: Create instant atmosphere with Tenderflame. Real flames without smoke or soot. Both safe and stylish. Create sustainable ambience indoors or out with no need for gas or electricity.

programme.title: Cordelia St Lounge Wear
programme.desc: Introducing Cordelia St's NEW Lounge Wear collection. Elevate your comfort game with stylish loungewear pieces perfect for relaxing in style at home.

programme.title: Magimix Culinary Innovation
programme.desc: Built to last, reflecting the philosophy of quality products that stand the test of time. Magimix brings creativity to your kitchen, accomplishing demanding tasks quickly, easily, and quietly.

programme.title: Good Morning TVSN
programme.desc: Kick off your mornings with TVSN. Watch as we showcase hot products with special sneak peeks and lively competitions. Catch vibrant and engaging mornings with us here at TVSN!

programme.title: SALE! Begins!
programme.desc: It's Sale time! This week TVSN offers fantastic savings on a wide range of products including Beauty and Fashion along with Jewellery and Health and much more.

programme.desc: Greyhound Racing from Casino, Bulli, Gosford, Geelong, Geelong Extra, Warragul, Q1 Lakeside, Townsville, Mandurah; Harness Racing from Wagga, Shepparton, Albion Park, Gloucester Park.

programme.title: Gravitas
programme.desc: The host provides a concise overview and in-depth analysis of social, political and economic news stories from around the world.

programme.desc: The host provides a concise overview and in-depth analysis of social, political and economic news stories from around the world.

programme.title: Wion Pulse
programme.desc: The host shares a detailed analysis of the latest news stories from various spheres including political and socio-economic issues from across the globe.

programme.desc: The host presents the latest political, social, sports and economic updates and speaks about the recent developments from around the world.

programme.desc: The host sheds light on the latest updates and key stories from the world of sports and exclusive interactions with sportspersons among other segments.

programme.title: Wion Live Broadcast from USA
programme.desc: The host presents the latest news updates and developments pertaining to significant social, political and economic events from the USA, live.

programme.title: Inside South Asia
programme.desc: The host presents a detailed analysis of the latest news updates and developments pertaining to politics, the economy and socio-cultural affairs in South Asia.

programme.title: Wion Fineprint

programme.title: Gravitas
programme.desc: The host provides a concise overview and in-depth analysis of social, political and economic news stories from around the world.

programme.title: The French Job
programme.desc: A comedic theory of what might have happened to the five masterpieces heisted from Musee de Paris. 2026. France. Director: Dominique Baumard. Starring: Melvil Poupaud, Sofiane Zerman.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/5. Maggie's hopes for her brother actualise, Kai is alive, however, his confessions upset her. 2024. Germany. Director: Christian Alvart. Starring: Julius Gause, Lucas Gregorowicz.

programme.title: The Outrun
programme.desc: Fresh out of Rehab, Rona returns home to the wild and beautiful islands of Orkney to start afresh. 2024. UK, Germany. Director: Nora Fingscheidt. Starring: Saoirse Ronan, Paapa Essiedu.

programme.title: Afterglows
programme.desc: On a chance encounter with a woman resembling his late wife, Akira must come to terms with his grief. 2023. Japan. Director: Taichi Kimura. Starring: Kentez Asaka, Nozomi de Lencquesaing.

programme.title: Before What Comes After
programme.desc: Doctor Augustin Masset opens dialogue with writer Fabrice Toussaint about the nuance of life and death. 2025. France. Director: Costa-Garvas. Starring: Denis Podalydes, Kad Merad.

programme.title: Outcast Of The Islands
programme.desc: When a man is caught stealing from the trading post he is sacked, but Captain Lingard takes pity on him. 1952. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: Ralph Richardson, Trevor Howard.

programme.title: Rosemead
programme.desc: An immigrant mother must act fast to protect her son, and possibly others, after discovering his obsession . 2025. United States. Director: Eric Lin. Starring: Lucy Liu, Lawrence Shou.

programme.title: Khartoum
programme.desc: The stories of five Sudanese citizens intertwine as they search for freedom. 2025. United Kingdom, Sudan. Director: Anas Saeed, Rawia Alhag, Ibrahim Snoopy, Timeea Mohamed Ahmed, Phil Cox.

programme.title: Mr Loverman
programme.desc: 1/5. Barry and his daughter Donna continue to coexist in a state of fragility. 2024. UK. Director: Hong Khaou. Starring: Teagan Imani, Lennie James.

programme.title: Mr Loverman
programme.desc: 1/6. When Barry learns of his grandson's betrayal, he has an unexpected outburst. 2024. UK. Director: Hong Khaou. Starring: Keenan Munn-Francis, Gabin Kongolo.

programme.title: Mr Loverman
programme.desc: 1/7. Barry's outburst forces him to confront his lifelong facade and the reality of his secret life. 2024. UK. Director: Hong Khaou. Starring: Keenan Munn-Francis, Gabin Kongolo.

programme.title: Copan
programme.desc: In a country torn apart by corruption, the Copan building and it's inhabitants are a beacon of everything Brazil stands for. 2025. Brazil, France. Director: Carine Wallauer.

programme.title: Mobile 101
programme.desc: 1/5. The courtcase travels to the United States, while Risto surprises his wife with a honeymoon in France. 2022. Finland. Director: Maarit Lalli. Starring: Magnus Af Sandeberg, Oona Airola.

programme.title: Mobile 101
programme.desc: 1/6. The relationship between Katarina and Aki treads uncertain grounds and Jorma gets an interesting job offer. 2022. Finland. Director: Maarit Lalli. Starring: Oona Airola, Martin Bahne.

programme.title: White Man Walking
programme.desc: Following the murder of George Floyd, Rob Bliss embarks on a grueling 1500 mile walk through the southern states of America. 2025. USA. Directors: Denise Alder, Rob Bliss.

programme.title: Afterglows
programme.desc: On a chance encounter with a woman resembling his late wife, Akira must come to terms with his grief. 2023. Japan. Director: Taichi Kimura. Starring: Kentez Asaka, Nozomi de Lencquesaing.

programme.title: Before What Comes After
programme.desc: Doctor Augustin Masset opens dialogue with writer Fabrice Toussaint about the nuance of life and death. 2025. France. Director: Costa-Garvas. Starring: Denis Podalydes, Kad Merad.

programme.title: Outcast Of The Islands
programme.desc: When a man is caught stealing from the trading post he is sacked, but Captain Lingard takes pity on him. 1952. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: Ralph Richardson, Trevor Howard.

programme.title: Afterglows
programme.desc: On a chance encounter with a woman resembling his late wife, Akira must come to terms with his grief. 2023. Japan. Director: Taichi Kimura. Starring: Kentez Asaka, Nozomi de Lencquesaing.

programme.title: The Sea Inside Her
programme.desc: Grandma must keep her Grandchild safe as her biggest fears try to interrupt their bedtime routine. 2024. NZ. Starring: Mateo Cruz, Alex Leonhartsburger. Directors: Alyx Duncan.

programme.title: The Revenant
programme.desc: Left for dead, Hugh must use his only weapon to survive in a winter hellscape, his wit. 2015. USA, Hong Kong. Director: Alejandro Gonzalez Inarritu. Starring: Leonardo DiCaprio, Tom Hardy.

programme.title: Janet Planet
programme.desc: Lacy spends summer at home with her mother Janet. Her wild imagination captivates everyone around her. 2023. USA, UK. Director: Annie Baker. Starring: Zoe Ziegler, Luke Philip Bosco.

programme.title: Chaplin's Modern Times: The Path of Silence.
programme.desc: The end of the 'silent film' era turned Charlie Chaplin's world on his head, follow his rebelion against modern cinema. 2024. France. Director: Gregory Monro.

programme.title: Kung-Fu Master!
programme.desc: A mother in her forties finds herself falling into an intense romanic affair with a 14-year-old boy. 1988. France. Director: Agnes Varda. Starring: Jane Birkin, Mathieu Demy.

programme.title: Nowhere
programme.desc: A group of LA teens trying to make sense of there multisectional lives attend the wildest party of the year. 1997. France, United States. Director: Gregg Araki. Starring: James Duval, Rachel True.

programme.title: LA Porta Rossa
programme.desc: 1/1. Cagliostro knows one of the victims of a car accident. What aid can he give? 2023. Italy. Director: Gianpaolo Tescari. Starring: Lino Guanciale.

programme.title: LA Porta Rossa
programme.desc: 1/2. Cagliostro is in two minds about using Vanessa as a confidante. 2023. Italy. Director: Gianpaolo Tescari. Starring: Lino Guanciale.

programme.title: LA Porta Rossa
programme.desc: 1/3. Filip again enters Vanessa's world. Paoletto wants news about Stella. 2023. Italy. Director: Gianpaolo Tescari. Starring: Lino Guanciale.

programme.title: LA Porta Rossa
programme.desc: 1/4. The past merges unhappily into the present in Cagliostro and Vanessa's investigation. 2023. Italy. Director: Gianpaolo Tescari. Starring: Lino Guanciale.

programme.title: Port Authority
programme.desc: Paul's brief encounter with Wye, a trans woman of colour, leaves him transfixed by her beauty. 2019. USA, France. Director: Danielle Lessovitz. Starring: Fionn Whitehead, Leyna Bloom.

programme.title: The Revenant
programme.desc: Left for dead, Hugh must use his only weapon to survive in a winter hellscape, his wit. 2015. USA, Hong Kong. Director: Alejandro Gonzalez Inarritu. Starring: Leonardo DiCaprio, Tom Hardy.

programme.title: Chaplin's Modern Times: The Path of Silence.
programme.desc: The end of the 'silent film' era turned Charlie Chaplin's world on his head, follow his rebelion against modern cinema. 2024. France. Director: Gregory Monro.

programme.title: The Sea Inside Her
programme.desc: Grandma must keep her Grandchild safe as her biggest fears try to interrupt their bedtime routine. 2024. NZ. Starring: Mateo Cruz, Alex Leonhartsburger. Directors: Alyx Duncan.

programme.title: Janet Planet
programme.desc: Lacy spends summer at home with her mother Janet. Her wild imagination captivates everyone around her. 2023. USA, UK. Director: Annie Baker. Starring: Zoe Ziegler, Luke Philip Bosco.

programme.title: Kung-Fu Master!
programme.desc: A mother in her forties finds herself falling into an intense romanic affair with a 14-year-old boy. 1988. France. Director: Agnes Varda. Starring: Jane Birkin, Mathieu Demy.

programme.title: Chaplin's Modern Times: The Path of Silence.
programme.desc: The end of the 'silent film' era turned Charlie Chaplin's world on his head, follow his rebelion against modern cinema. 2024. France. Director: Gregory Monro.

programme.title: The People's Joker
programme.desc: An aspiring clown grappling with her gender identity combats a fascistic caped crusader. 2022. USA. Director: Vera Drew. Starring: Vera Drew, Lynn Downey, Kane Distler.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: Yeung's behaviour reminds Ming of his own infamous rise to fame. 2003. Hong Kong, China. Directors: Wai Keung Lau, Alan Mak. Starring: Andy Lau, Tony Leung Chiu-wai.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: Fwends
programme.desc: Two friends reconnect over the course of a weekend, navigating what it means to be a woman. 2025. Australia. Director: Sophie Somerville. Starring: Melissa Gan, Emmanuelle Mattana.

programme.title: Antidote
programme.desc: In this urgently topical documentary, a whistle blowers from inside Russia's poison program risks his life to expose Vladimir Putin's authoritarian regime. 2024. USA. Director: James Jones.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 6/1. Vinnie's new acquaintance accuses him of stealing a prized possession, so the gang go on a wild goose chase to find the real culprits. 2024. UK. Director: Ben Gregor. Starring: Joe Gilgun.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 6/2. Davey and Donna MacDonagh sniff an opportunity with Manolito's absence and make moves on his turf. 2024. UK. Director: Ben Gregor. Starring: Joe Gilgun.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 6/3. Farmer Jim is forced on a bumpy trip down memory lane when an old flame pops up in Hawley. 2024. UK. Director: Ben Gregor. Starring: Joe Gilgun, Michelle Keegan.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 6/4. Tommo helps his new friend, literally, get his groove back. Vinnie and the gang rescue Gideon from the clutch of a naked cult. 2024. UK. Director: Richard Signy. Starring: Joe Gilgun.

programme.title: Brian And Maggie
programme.desc: Brian Walden's infamous interview with Margaret Thatcher that catalysed her resignation. 2025. UK. Director: Stephen Frears. Starring: Steve Coogan, Harriet Walter, Ross Armstrong.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: Fwends
programme.desc: Two friends reconnect over the course of a weekend, navigating what it means to be a woman. 2025. Australia. Director: Sophie Somerville. Starring: Melissa Gan, Emmanuelle Mattana.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: Yeung's behaviour reminds Ming of his own infamous rise to fame. 2003. Hong Kong, China. Directors: Wai Keung Lau, Alan Mak. Starring: Andy Lau, Tony Leung Chiu-wai.

programme.title: Medicine
programme.desc: Two backpackers in India offer to nurse a baby while the Grandmother steps off the bus, but the bus keeps moving . 2023. NZ. Director: William McKegg. Starring: George Mason, Phoenix Connolly.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: Elvira
programme.desc: 1/1. Elvira works as a receptionist at a brothel. When a prostitute goes missing, Elvira feels an urge to investigate. 2022. Denmark. Director: Heidi Maria Faisst. Starring: Sara Klein Larsen.

programme.title: Elvira
programme.desc: 1/2. While babysitting Candy's son, Elvira ventures into unfamiliar territory. 2022. Denmark. Directors: Heidi Maria Faisst, Oliver Ussing. Starring: Sara Klein Larsen.

programme.title: Gondola
programme.desc: Two female cable car operators fall in love as they pass each other in their gondolas. 2023. Germany. Director: Veit Helmer. Starring: Nino Soselia, Mathilde Irrmann.

programme.title: Young Werther
programme.desc: Despite her engagement, Werther turns his life upside-down to win Charlotte's heart. 2024. Canada. Director: Jose Avelino Gilles Corbett Lourenco. Starring: Patrick J. Adams, Alison Pill.

programme.title: Between The Temples
programme.desc: A greif-stricken cantor is in a crisis of faith when his grade-school music teacher re-enters his life. 2024. USA. Director: Nathan Silver. Starring: Jason Schwartzman, Carol Kane.

programme.title: Last Call
programme.desc: A desperate fugitive takes a family hostage with a live grenade at the turn of the millennium. 2026. Greece. Director: Sherif Francis. Starring: Orfeas Avgoustidis, Maria Nafpliotou.

programme.title: Unsane
programme.desc: A young girl is admitted to a mental institution where she faces her biggest fear, is it real or is it all in her head? 2018. USA. Director: Steven Soderbergh. Starring: Claire Foy, Joshua Leonard.
